generated_oml:
instance DS18S20TemperatureSensorA : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with 64-bit unique ID, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C (±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RabbitMQDataPipeline
]

instance DS18S20TemperatureSensorB : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with 64-bit unique ID, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C (±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RabbitMQDataPipeline
]

instance DS18S20TemperatureSensorC : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with 64-bit unique ID, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C (±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RabbitMQDataPipeline
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed (214×214×3 mm) controlled via Raspberry Pi GPIO through MOSFETs for 4A switching and optocouplers for isolation"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan (airflow 0.02 m³/s) operating at 12V or 24V, controlled via Raspberry Pi GPIO with MOSFETs and optocouplers"
]

instance RabbitMQDataPipeline : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20TemperatureSensorA, DS18S20TemperatureSensorB, DS18S20TemperatureSensorC
]

instance TemperatureReadings : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature readings from DS18S20 sensors with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RabbitMQDataPipeline
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance PowerSupplyVoltageCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Power supply voltage and current measurements for heatbed and fan actuators"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RabbitMQDataPipeline
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance ActuatorStates : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "State information of heatbed and fan actuators (on/off, duty cycle)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RabbitMQDataPipeline
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with parameters C_air and G_box, calibrated using Scipy non-linear least squares solver"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with parameters C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box, calibrated using Scipy non-linear least squares solver"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for data transmission between physical and digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance ScipyCalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy library for non-linear least squares optimization in model calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based simulation environment for thermal models"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService
]

instance RaspberryPiControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for GPIO control and sensor communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for GPIO control and sensor communication"
]

instance PCBComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB featuring MOSFETs for high-current (4A) switching and optocouplers for signal isolation"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system consisting of styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ air volume), heatbed (214×214×3 mm), fan (airflow 0.02 m³/s), three DS18S20 temperature sensors (accuracy ±0.5°C between -10°C to +85°C), Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller, PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers, and power supply"
    base:contains DS18S20TemperatureSensorA, DS18S20TemperatureSensorB, DS18S20TemperatureSensorC, HeatbedActuator, FanActuator, RaspberryPiController, PCBComponent
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that updates model parameters using non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelCalibrationInsight
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that uses Model A and Model B for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that detects safety violations and optimizes performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, PerformanceOptimizationInsight
]

instance ModelCalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from model parameter calibration using Scipy non-linear least squares"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values from simulation models"
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected safety violations in thermal incubator system"
]

instance PerformanceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for optimizing system performance based on monitoring results"
]

instance SafetyAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic system adjustment triggered by safety violation detection"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HumanDecisionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Human intervention required for system adjustments based on monitoring insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed) generated by the controller are sent via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which executes the commands on the physical actuators."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated via RabbitMQ where the physical twin's controller and low-level driver interact with digital twin components (simulation models, monitoring) through message queues, as illustrated in Figure 7 of the document."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated (the DT integrates models and data from the deployed physical system for real-time monitoring and prediction)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Models validated through uniform temperature tests (Assumption 1) and parameter calibration via residual error minimization; Model B showed better prediction of thermal inertia compared to Model A."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker running on Raspberry Pi, using Wi-Fi/Bluetooth for network connectivity, with data transmitted via message queues between physical and virtual components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, with RabbitMQ server, low-level driver, and controller all running on the same device."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "A safe protocol is incorporated into the low-level driver to maintain device safety during operation, though specific cybersecurity measures are not detailed."
]
